evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: 개인정보 비식별화·가명처리 등 컴플라이언스 대응 파이프라인 구축 (Build compliance pipelines for personal data de-identification/pseudonymization)
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Rigour signals dominate throughout — compliance pipelines, data quality assurance, data integrity, governance, lineage management — with no velocity/speed language present.
evidence.domain_risk: 개인정보 비식별화·가명처리 등 컴플라이언스 대응 파이프라인 구축 (compliance pipelines for personal data de-identification/pseudonymization)
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: Explicit compliance language around personal data de-identification and pseudonymization for a major retailer's advertising/DMP data, meeting the high override for regulatory/compliance content.
evidence.data_team_maturity: ID Graph / ID Resolution 설계 (회원ID, 디바이스ID, 쿠키 등 식별자 매핑) (Design ID Graph/ID Resolution mapping member ID, device ID, cookies)
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: The role is asked to design foundational ID resolution and taxonomy systems from the ground up for a new advertising/DMP capability, indicating a growing function still building core infrastructure.
evidence.jd_authorship: 룰 기반 및 모델 기반 세그먼트 산출 파이프라인 개발 (Develop rule-based and model-based segment output pipelines)
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Highly specific technical scope (ID Graph/ID Resolution, audience segmentation, taxonomy design, compliance pipelines) makes the day-to-day work very clear.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: The role explicitly supports advertising and retail media (DMP) use cases — audience segmentation and ID resolution for ad targeting — placing it in commercial.
evidence.autonomy_level: ID Graph / ID Resolution 설계 (Design ID Graph/ID Resolution)
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: The role designs foundational systems (ID Graph, taxonomy, compliance pipelines) from scratch — clearly direction-setting/strategic.
evidence.ai_role_explanation: No mention of AI tools for the candidate or AI-consuming data infrastructure anywhere in the JD.
evidence.testing_framing: 데이터 무결성 확보를 위한 품질 관리 및 지표 정합성 검증 경험 (data integrity quality management and metric validation experience)
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Data quality and metric validation are framed as an owned, built responsibility (quality assurance, outlier/missing-value management) rather than a listed tool.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: 개인정보 비식별화·가명처리 등 컴플라이언스 대응 파이프라인 구축
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: High: explicit compliance/personal-data-protection framing appears among the first responsibilities, reflecting fear of regulatory exposure around identity data.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: ID Graph / ID Resolution 설계 (회원ID, 디바이스ID, 쿠키 등 식별자 매핑) (Design ID Graph/ID Resolution)
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: Responsibilities are dominated by 'design' and 'build' verbs for new ID resolution, taxonomy, and compliance systems rather than maintaining existing infrastructure.
evidence.loss_aversion: 개인정보 비식별화·가명처리 등 컴플라이언스 대응 파이프라인 구축 — compliance pipeline for personal data protection reflects regulatory risk exposure.
